flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Gogebic Community College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (579 → 511).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gogebic Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Gogebic Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (54.3% → 63.7%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Gogebic Community College are 10% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($41.0k vs $37.3k).
